name: handoff
description: Session continuity in a single command — /handoff detects the session state and routes. SAVE: an extractor reads the session transcript (and teammates' transcripts when a clã/Agent Team is active) and mechanically generates a verbatim chronological ata (LOG-<sessão>.md with stable item ids) AND a prospective block (open tasks + last plan, derived from real tool_results) that pre-fills the 'what's left' sections; Claude then writes only the thematic PRD at {project_root}/.claude/HANDOFF.md referencing those ids. A Stop-hook completeness gate blocks until every strong item is covered, no template placeholder ({{...}}) remains, and every non-trivial Próximos Passos step carries the 5-field molde. RESUME: rehydrates from the PRD and actively recovers context for any thin step before acting. Optional [salvar|retomar] argument forces the mode.
